title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Defined host/session-backed provider handoff contract for Meeting Ingest. Added docs/provider-handoff-contract.md covering engine/request JSON, sub-agent response envelope, ProviderResponse payload, identity verification, engine ingest flow, CLI/library shape, failure behavior, and privacy/source-control rules. Cross-linked the contract from design proposal, current questions, implementation plan, and decisions.
next_actions: Implement host/session-backed provider path: factor shared ProviderResponse JSON parsing out of anthropic provider, add request/response envelope dataclasses or helpers, add --provider session/--provider-response handling, and test that externally supplied provider JSON uses the same validation, signal enrichment, renderer, ledger, archive, and reconcile flow.
continuation_hint: Next: Implement host/session-backed provider path: factor shared ProviderResponse JSON parsing out of anthropic provider, add request/response envelope dataclasses or helpers, add --provider session/--provider-response handling, and test that externally supplied provider JSON uses the same validation, signal enrichment, renderer, ledger, archive, and reconcile flow.
